section.heading: Coalbank Slough deemed not navigable waters of the United States for certain purposes

content.p: The Coalbank Slough in Coos Bay, Oregon, is deemed to not be navigable waters of the United States for all purposes of subchapter J of Chapter I of title 33, Code of Federal Regulations.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 116–283, div. G, title LVXXXIV [LXXXIV], § 8436, Jan. 1, 2021, 134 Stat. 4736.)
